Package org.javalabs.jpa.query

package org.javalabs.jpa.query
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.javalabs.jpa
     
  • Class
    Description
    AbstractExpr
    Base abstraction for expressions used in query construction.
    Binder
    Abstract binder class used to bind the result set with appropriate entity.
    Condition
    Enum to hold the various conditions.
    Criteria
    JPA Criteria query.
    CriteriaDelete
    Represents a criteria-based delete operation.
    CriteriaUpdate
    Represents a criteria-based update operation.
    DatabaseQuery
    Abstract class to represent a database query.
    DBResultSetHandler
    DB result set handler.
    DeleteExpr
    Represents a delete expression in a query model.
    DeleteExprVisitor
    Visitor for SelectExpr.
    DeleteQuery
    Insert query that will handle all delete operation.
    Expr
    Represents a criteria expression.
    ExprVisitor
    A concrete visitor class for evaluating Expr
    FromExpr
    From clause expression
    FromExprVisitor
    Visitor for FromExpr.
    GroupByExpr
    Group by expression.
    GroupByExprVisitor
    Visitor for GroupByExpr.
    IndexRetrievalStrategy
    Class that follows index based retrieval strategy.
    InsertQuery
    Insert query that will handle all insert operation.
    NameRetrievalStrategy
    Class that follows index based retrieval strategy.
    NativeJdbcQuery
    An extension of SelectObjectQuery and JPA TypedQuery.
    OneToManyBinder
    One-to-many Binder class.
    OneToOneBinder
    One-to-one Binder class.
    Operator
    Enum listing the set of supported operators for criteria query.
    OrderByExpr
    Order by expression.
    OrderByExprVisitor
    Visitor for OrderByExpr.
    ParameterImpl
    Parameter class.
    QueryBuffer
    Class that represents the buffer to temporarily hold the raw sql query string.
    QueryExpr
    The expression criteria class to hold the parsed expression.
    ResultSetHandler
    Jdbc Result set Handler.
    RetrievalStrategy
    Abstract class to define the column value retrieval strategy.
    SBPool
    This is a query builder pool.
    SBPoolImpl
    Implementation of SBPool.
    SelectExpr
    Select expression.
    SelectExprVisitor
    Visitor for SelectExpr.
    SelectQuery
    Select Object Query class.
    SetExpr
    Set clause expression.
    SetExprVisitor
    Visitor for WhereExpr.
    UpdateExpr
    Represents an update expression in a query model.
    UpdateExprVisitor
    Visitor for SelectExpr.
    UpdateQuery
    Insert query that will handle all update operation.
    Visitable
    Interface that represents a visitable object.
    Visitor
    Interface that represents a visitor.
    WhereExpr
    Where clause expression.
    WhereExprVisitor
    Visitor for WhereExpr.
    WriteQuery
    Indicates a database write query.
